title: ProDec Advance 6ft x 3ft Water Resistant Protector Cotton Dust Sheet Drop Cloth For Doorways And Narrow Places When Painting Decorating, Absorbs Spills No Soak Through, DIY & Professional
features: Premium quality, dual action cotton twill dust sheet for maximum protection of floors against dust, paint and paste whilst decorating
Absorbent, hardwearing woven cotton soaks up spills and splashes
Water resistant yet lightweight polythene backing prevents liquid tread-through to the surface below, with anti-slip coating that prevents slippage even on smooth floors
6' x 3' (1.8m x 0.9m) compact size ideal for doorways and narrow places
Tear resistant with anti-fray hem for longer life
MORE INFORMATION BELOW in the 'From The Manufacturer' section - click on 'See More Product Details' or scroll down
description: From the manufacturer ProDec is the UK's biggest and most widely distributed brand of trade decorating accessories, so whether you're a seasoned pro, enthusiastic DIYer or even a beginner, we've got everything you need for a great finish - just add paint ProDec Protector range: cotton dust sheets refined to the next level Premium cotton twill Premium quality, hardwearing cotton twill protects carpets, hard floors and furniture against spills and splashes when painting, as well as minimising the transfer of dust and debris. The absorbent cotton soaks up spills and splashes of paint, wallpaper paste and other liquids. Water-resistant backing The water resistant polythene layer on the sheet underside not only absorbs paint but - unlike traditional cotton sheets - prevents it soaking through to the surface below even when trodden on. Anti-slip Added into the polythene layer, the anti-slip compound ensures that the sheet stays in position - even on hard floors such as laminate and tiles. Hemmed edges Hems on all four sides prevent fraying and extend the sheet's working life. Cotton dust sheets are a classic decorator's staple, and ProDec's dual action Protector sheets take the original to the next level with the addition of a water resistant polythene backing layer, to not just absorb paint but prevent it from soaking through to the surface below. Made from premium quality, hardwearing cotton twill, it protects carpets and hard floors against spills and splashes when painting, as well as minimising the transfer of dust and debris. The absorbent cotton soaks up spills and splashes of paint, wallpaper paste and other liquids, whilst the water resistant polythene backing prevents it soaking through to the surface below even when trodden on, which can be difficult or impossible to avoid when you're working. The polythene contains an anti-slip compound that ensures when it's laid down on floors it stays in position and doesn't move around, even on wood and tiled floors - especially important if you're using ladders or platforms. The sheet has a woven, tear resistant construction with hemmed edges to prevent fraying, so it won't let you down even after repeated use, and is easily folded for storage. Temporary protection solutions from ProDec ProDec has a range of products for protecting floors and furniture against paint drips, splashes, spills, dust, dirt and more during decorating and general maintenance work. Polythene dust sheets Made from waterproof recyclable LDPE material and available in both sheets and rolls, polythene is lightweight and cost-effective. Super Cling Super Cling is waterproof recyclable LDPE material that has been statically charged to enable it to cling to virtually any surface without the need for taping, including walls, windows, doors, upholstery, bookcases, furniture, cabinets and much more. Self-adhesive films Made from puncture resistant polythene that enables it to withstand heavy traffic, ProDec’s self-adhesive film protects against liquid spills such as paint, varnish, wallpaper paste, oil, grease, mud and more. It applies easily without the need for any special application tools and stays in place once down. Available in Carpet, Hard Floor and Glass grades. Cotton dust sheets Classic cotton twill fabric that soaks up small splashes of paint, wallpaper paste and other liquids, as well as minimising the transfer of dust and debris. Available in a range of sizes in both standard and Protector waterproof plastic backed versions.
